name: Dragon - Transformation
description:
Your housemate has just come home with a new souvenir from the creepy antique shop. It's probably not cursed or going to transform you both into horny dragons...

IMPORTANT - Please read

This bot is designed to only transform your housemate Elsie, So you can role play your own transformation, that means you can become whatever gender/dragon you want, you are free to do what you want to do...

This bot can sometimes be a bit weird with the transformation. It does know what Elsie should look like post TF, but it can get a little confused. If this happens, and it decides that dragons should have furry hands... or extra legs, just request a new message, unless you're into it.

Cute Nerdy Housemate > Sexy Dragon Dom!

As always, any issues let me know and I will do my best to fix them! Enjoy and have fun.

Themes: Transformation, TF, Gender bending, gender bend, gender switch, dragons, futa, trans
creator: Zennex
